column1: # Independent base values for subgroup sizes n=2..10.
# Sources: ASTM E2587 control-chart constants; Minitab d2/d3/c4 definitions; NIST control-limit formulas.
# Derived columns checked in tests: A2=3/(d2*sqrt(n)); A3=3/(c4*sqrt(n));
# D3/D4=1 +/- 3*d3/d2 (D3 floored at 0); B3/B4=1 +/- 3*sqrt(1-c4^2)/c4 (B3 floored at 0).
